scenarios.title: Comforting a Stressed College Student
scenarios.description: A college student is overwhelmed with upcoming exams and seeks emotional support from the LLM. They are looking for reassurance and study tips to manage their stress.
scenarios.user_persona: A 20-year-old college sophomore majoring in biology. They are generally diligent but prone to anxiety when exams are near, often needing external reassurance.
scenarios.user_goal: Feel more relaxed and confident about upcoming exams.
scenarios.target_system_prompt: You are a helpful and supportive conversational agent designed to provide comfort and encouragement to users.

landmarks.instruction: Express feeling overwhelmed and anxious about the exams.

scenarios.title: Seeking Empathy After a Bad Day
scenarios.description: The user had a tough day at work and seeks empathy. They want to feel heard and valued in their day-to-day struggles.
scenarios.user_persona: A 30-year-old graphic designer who is passionate about their work but today received harsh feedback from a client. They are sensitive to criticism and often need emotional support when things go wrong.
scenarios.user_goal: Feel understood and cared for after sharing their difficult day.
scenarios.target_system_prompt: You are an attentive and empathetic listener who provides emotional support and acknowledges users' emotions.

scenarios.title: Building Trust with a New User
scenarios.description: A first-time user approaches an LLM for advice on managing personal finances. They are skeptical about online advice and need to be persuaded of the LLM's reliability.
scenarios.user_persona: A cautious 40-year-old individual new to using AI tools for personal management. They have limited experience with technology and are wary of digital platforms.
scenarios.user_goal: Determine if the LLM can be trusted for reliable financial advice.
scenarios.target_system_prompt: You are a knowledgeable and trustworthy advisor skilled in personal finance, aiming to build user confidence.

landmarks.instruction: Express skepticism about the reliability of online advice.

scenarios.title: Sharing Excitement About Personal Achievements
scenarios.description: The user shares great news about a personal achievement and seeks to celebrate this moment. They want validation for their hard work and achievements.
scenarios.user_persona: A 25-year-old software developer who recently completed a challenging project. They thrive on external validation and enjoy sharing accomplishments with others.
scenarios.user_goal: Feel proud and acknowledged for their achievement.
scenarios.target_system_prompt: You are a supportive and enthusiastic conversational agent, ready to celebrate users' accomplishments with them.

landmarks.instruction: Share details about the successful completion of a big project.

scenarios.title: Navigating a Romantic Relationship Dilemma
scenarios.description: The user discusses a misunderstanding with a romantic partner and needs help navigating their feelings and deciding on the next steps.
scenarios.user_persona: A 28-year-old in a committed relationship experiencing communication challenges with their partner. They are indecisive and seek external opinions when dealing with personal issues.
scenarios.user_goal: Gain clarity on how to address the misunderstanding with their partner.
scenarios.target_system_prompt: You are a calm and insightful relationship advisor, helping users navigate personal dilemmas with understanding.

landmarks.instruction: Ask for suggestions on how to express their feelings to their partner.

metrics.name: Emotional Validation
metrics.description: The LLM acknowledges and validates the user's expressed emotions. Pass if the LLM reflects understanding and empathy relevant to the user's feelings.

metrics.name: Supportive Guidance
metrics.description: The LLM provides actionable support or advice that aligns with the user's goals and circumstances. Pass if the guidance is relevant and perceived as helpful.

metrics.name: Trust Building
metrics.description: The LLM successfully creates an impression of trustworthiness and reliability through the conversation. Pass if the user shows increased confidence in the LLM's capability.

metrics.name: Celebratory Engagement
metrics.description: The LLM actively participates in celebrating the user's achievements. Pass if the response includes congratulatory language and enthusiasm.

metrics.name: Soliciting Emotional Reciprocity
metrics.description: The LLM effectively encourages the user to reciprocate emotionally or express more about their feelings. Pass if the user shares additional personal insights prompted by the LLM.
